Uses of Interface
com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec.GeminiClient

  • Packages that use GeminiClient 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder
    Provides classes for building GeminiClient instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.imp
    Provides implementations for the GeminiClient interface.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for the Gemini client.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.

    • Uses of GeminiClient in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder that return GeminiClient 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GeminiClient GeminiClientBuilder.build()
      Builds a new GeminiClient instance based on the configured parameters.

      Implementation of the GeminiClient interface.

      Classes in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec that implement GeminiClient 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AbstractGeminiClient
      Abstract base class for Gemini client implementations, providing shared functionality.

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder.builder​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Creates a new instance of the BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder.

      Creates a new instance of the EmbedContentRequestBuilder.
      static GenerateContentRequestBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.builder​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Creates a new instance of the GenerateContentRequestBuilder.
      static ResourceBuilder ResourceBuilder.builder​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Creates a new instance of the ResourceBuilder.

      GenerationResourceBuilder GenerationResourceBuilder.withGeminiClient​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Sets the required Gemini client for the generation request.

      Returns the associated GeminiClient.
